overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction RPG showing a character in a spacesuit walking through a dark frontier settlement at night. The character moves from a residential area with dome-shaped habitation modules toward an industrial section with large storage tanks and scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier settlement habitation area with dome structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the settlement toward dome-shaped habitation modules

notable_agents.action: standing on metal stairs observing the area

entered.detail: large arched dome structure with metallic frame and fabric covering
industrial metal staircase attached to a platform
network of pipes running along the ground and structures
simple wooden table or crate in the open area
large vehicle tire lying on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark sci-fi settlement at night, approaching dome-shaped habitation structures. Sparse NPCs are scattered throughout the area, including one standing on metal stairs to the right. The ground is unpaved dirt with industrial debris including a large tire.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial processing area with storage tanks and scaffolding

events.description: moving from habitation domes toward industrial tank structures and metal scaffolding

agents.ego_description: approaching large industrial storage tanks and navigating around metal scaffolding

entered.detail: tall cylindrical metal storage tanks with piping connections
elevated metal walkway and support structures

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the residential area toward an industrial installation featuring large cylindrical storage tanks and extensive metal scaffolding. The dome structures fall behind as the character approaches the processing equipment, with the large tire now visible to the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark frontier settlement that transitions from a residential zone into a heavy industrial area. It begins with the character walking across unpaved dirt strewn with debris, passing by dome-shaped habitation structures and sparse NPCs, including one positioned on metal stairs to the right. As the character advances, the residential domes recede into the background while the path shifts past a large tire now positioned to the left. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive industrial installation, with the camera gliding toward towering cylindrical storage tanks and intricate metal scaffolding.
